common.tagline: Strategic websites, Law 25 compliance, and AI automation
common.siteDescription: Mark Systems builds strategic websites, Law 25-ready digital foundations, and practical AI automations for Quebec SMBs.

consent.cookieBanner: We use cookies to improve your experience.
consent.privacyNotice: Your data is protected under Quebec's Law 25.

hero.badge: Strategic web, automation, applied AI, architecture
hero.description: Strategic websites, business automation, interactive products, applied AI systems, and technical architecture: Mark Systems helps Quebec SMBs sell more clearly, operate faster, and regain control of their digital stack.

servicesSection.label: Core Offer
servicesSection.title: Four digital levers that move an SMB forward
servicesSection.description: A simpler, more commercial offer: website, compliance, automation, and custom tools.

servicesPage.label: Our Services
servicesPage.title: Services built to sell today and automate tomorrow
servicesPage.description: Mark Systems first helps clarify digital presence, fix or redesign websites, and establish a Law 25-ready foundation, then automates the processes that truly slow the business down.

web-strategy-redesign.title: Strategic Websites & Redesign
web-strategy-redesign.shortDescription: Brochure sites and partial or full redesigns that explain your value more clearly, build trust, and convert better.
web-strategy-redesign.longDescription: We design or redesign websites around a clear business objective: sharpen your positioning, filter inquiries better, improve mobile experience, and give your company a more credible digital presence. The work covers content architecture, design, development, and customer journey improvement.
capabilities: Quebec local SEO and FR/EN bilingual delivery

law-25-digital-foundation.title: Digital Compliance & Law 25 Foundation
law-25-digital-foundation.shortDescription: Fast upgrades to the essentials that reduce risk: forms, consent, privacy pages, data collection, and web foundations.
law-25-digital-foundation.longDescription: We bring the visible and practical parts of a site's compliance back under control: better-framed forms, consent language, privacy policy, cookie banner, cleaner data collection flows, and consistent contact information. The goal is not legal theater, but a more serious and reassuring digital foundation.
capabilities: Alignment of contact, hosting, and legal mentions

ai-automation-workflows.title: AI Automation & Workflows
ai-automation-workflows.shortDescription: Useful, measurable automations that remove manual work, speed up follow-up, and help you use information better.
ai-automation-workflows.longDescription: This is the main vocation behind Mark Systems. We connect your tools, documents, email, and processes to automate repetitive work, summarize useful information, qualify requests, orchestrate follow-up, and build AI-assisted workflows that remain understandable and controllable.

custom-platforms-tools.title: Custom Platforms & Internal Tools
custom-platforms-tools.shortDescription: When a website is not enough, we design the tool or platform that actually supports your operations.
custom-platforms-tools.longDescription: For some mandates, the right answer is neither a simple website nor an isolated automation. We then build dashboards, portals, configurators, advanced forms, or lightweight platforms that support a concrete operation. This is the space between web presence, internal tooling, and a tailored digital product.

projectsSection.label: Case Studies
projectsSection.title: Real deliverables, from client sites to proprietary stack
projectsSection.description: Delivered websites, lead-generation tools, n8n automation, and a proprietary stack that proves technical depth beyond a brochure site.

projectsPage.label: Case Studies
projectsPage.title: Mark Systems Portfolio
projectsPage.description: A selection of client websites, interactive products, and proprietary systems showing how Mark Systems executes from front-end to orchestration.

usine-rh.title: HR Factory
usine-rh.methodology: Positioning, offer structure, and trust journey
usine-rh.challenge: Turn an HR consulting offer into a clear, credible SMB-focused website that explains value, services, and method quickly without overwhelming visitors.
usine-rh.solution: Built a web presence around a strong message, a 10-service offer, a simple SMB journey, and visible compliance elements: privacy policy, consent, cookie handling, and Law 25-related notices.
usine-rh.result: A clearer, more credible site for an SMB audience, with strong content structure, FR/EN delivery, and a digital foundation ready for future automation layers.

beaumont-avocats.title: Beaumont Lawyers
beaumont-avocats.challenge: Present a multidisciplinary law firm in a clearer, more current, and more reassuring way while simplifying access to expertise and contact entry points.
beaumont-avocats.solution: Reframed the experience around four main practice areas, sharper messaging, a legal situation assessment path, and a website aligned with current trust and compliance expectations.
beaumont-avocats.result: A more strategic digital presence for a 25+ year law firm, with better content hierarchy, clearer entry points, and stronger data collection foundations.

estimaweb-qc.title: EstimaWeb QC
estimaweb-qc.methodology: Wizard UX, pricing logic, and lead capture
estimaweb-qc.challenge: Turn the vague question of “how much does a website cost?” into a credible Quebec-specific tool that educates prospects while qualifying the opportunity.
estimaweb-qc.solution: Built a full Next.js estimator with a multi-step journey, economic/recommended/premium scenarios, sector-based logic, PDF export, and pricing aligned with the Mark Systems offer.
estimaweb-qc.result: A sales asset that combines UX, business logic, and conversion. Visitors get a structured estimate; Mark Systems gets a far more qualified lead.

nexos-soic-stack.title: NEXOS + SOIC + OSIRIS
nexos-soic-stack.methodology: Quality convergence, specialized agents, and real tooling
nexos-soic-stack.challenge: Move beyond prototype thinking into a chain that can scope, generate, audit, fix, and ship web systems with far more rigor than the standard agency workflow.
nexos-soic-stack.solution: Assembled a proprietary stack built around NEXOS for web orchestration, SOIC for quality gates, and OSIRIS for auditing. The whole layer relies on specialized agents, real CLI tooling, and auto-fix loops.
nexos-soic-stack.result: A technical backbone that accelerates production, standardizes quality, and directly supports both client work and internal products.

n8n-ecosystem.title: Enterprise n8n Ecosystem
n8n-ecosystem.challenge: Managing disparate business operations — CRM, finance, documents, communications, IoT — across 14+ functional domains with no unified automation layer.
n8n-ecosystem.solution: Designed and deployed 195 production workflows on n8n: 52 AI-powered (RAG, agents, classifiers), 24 communication automations, 18 document processing pipelines, 17 finance workflows, 16 voice pipelines, and 7 IoT orchestrations.
n8n-ecosystem.result: 195 workflows in production. 57% AI-powered. 12 custom community nodes installed. Complete governance with 35+ metadata fields per workflow.

about.missionTitle: Make digital systems more useful, then more intelligent
about.mission: Mark Systems helps SMBs build a clearer, more credible, and more compliant digital presence, then automate the operations that slow growth down. A website is often not the end state; it is the first brick before workflows, internal tools, and more capable AI systems.
about.teamTitle: A rare hybrid profile, grounded in real work
about.teamDescription: Web design, engineering rigor, and AI automation in one practice.
about.valuesDescription: Four non-negotiable principles that define every engagement.

founder.bio: Senior engineer based in Quebec, with 10+ years of field experience in automation and industrial systems. That rigor now carries into strategic websites, business automation, interactive tools, and digital systems built to hold up beyond the demo.

0.title: Precision Over Hype
0.description: We ship measurable results, not promises. Every system is benchmarked with real metrics before delivery — no buzzwords, no magic, just engineering.

1.title: Systems Thinking
1.description: Every component is designed for the whole. We build solutions that integrate into existing infrastructure — not isolated prototypes that break on contact with reality.

2.title: Battle-Tested Engineering
2.description: 10+ years of industrial field experience means we build for failure modes, not just happy paths. PLC rigor applied to AI systems.

3.title: Zero Vendor Lock-In
3.description: Multi-LLM, multi-cloud, open-source first. Your systems run on your terms — we build abstraction layers, not dependencies.

brief.title: Project Brief — Mark Systems
brief.description: Brief form for your web project.

0.question: What is Mark Systems and how is it related to ECI Mark Systems?
0.answer: Mark Systems is an AI engineering firm specializing in workflow automation, multi-agent orchestration, and intelligent systems, based in Quebec. We have no affiliation with ECI Mark Systems, which is a residential construction ERP software provider.

1.question: Where should we start if what we really need is a new website?
1.answer: That is often the right starting point. We can begin with a full or partial redesign, clarify your offer, clean up forms and user journeys, add the most important Law 25 elements, and then layer in AI automation once the digital foundation is solid.

2.question: Can you help with Law 25 compliance without rebuilding the entire site?
2.answer: Yes. In many cases, a targeted upgrade is enough: forms, consent, privacy policy, cookie banner, data collection flow, and legal page consistency. If a broader redesign is actually needed, we will say so clearly.

3.question: What kinds of AI automation do you actually build?
3.answer: We build n8n workflows, email and follow-up automations, document processing, LLM integrations, AI summaries and classifications, and more advanced tools when a simple workflow is not enough. The goal stays practical: save time, reduce misses, and use information better.

4.question: Do you work with clients outside Quebec?
4.answer: Yes, but the positioning is clearly centered on Quebec SMBs. That said, mandates can be delivered remotely and the expertise in website design, digital compliance, and AI automation translates well beyond Quebec.

5.question: Why show a Systems page on a services website?
5.answer: Because Mark Systems is not just selling design or copy. The Systems page shows the real technical layer behind the work: internal tools, proprietary stack, n8n automation, instrumented quality, and the ability to build far beyond a simple brochure site.

overview.label: Technical Positioning
overview.title: Why this page exists
problemPoints: Clean-looking websites with little proof of technical depth
Vague AI claims without real tooling underneath
Fragile stacks that are hard to maintain or evolve
An artificial split between website, automation, and operating system
solutionPoints: Real assets: client websites, estimators, workflows, proprietary stack
A quality layer: SOIC, audits, real tooling, and auto-fix loops
A web orchestration layer: NEXOS to structure, generate, validate, and correct
A full-stack approach: front-end, business logic, automation, and architecture
